interactions.trust_high_description: Reliable community member with many successful pifs

map.see_distances: See distances and find nearby items

map.demo_token_note: The map feature requires a Mapbox API token. In production, this is handled automatically via the backend.

map.map_loaded_announcement: Map page loaded, showing community posts on map
